description_long: A young adult male stands upright, dressed in a futuristic, fitted outfit with a high-collared jacket and asymmetrical shoulder armor. The jacket features a prominent, padded collar and a single, angular shoulder guard on the left side, giving a sci-fi or tactical appearance. His attire includes a belted tunic with utility pouches, slim pants, and sturdy, high-ankle boots, all designed for mobility and protection. The clothing is accented with contrasting bands and panels, adding visual interest and a sense of layered construction. His hands are gloveless and relaxed at his sides, and his facial features are clean-shaven with neatly styled, short hair. The overall look suggests a character prepared for urban exploration or patrol in a modern or near-future city environment.
description: A young adult male in a futuristic, fitted outfit with a high-collared jacket, asymmetrical shoulder armor, and sturdy boots, standing upright and ready for urban activity.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high-collared jacket, angular shoulder armor, utility belt, and relaxed facial expression.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the padded collar, shoulder guard, and the slim fit of the pants and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the jacket, the belt with pouches, and the layered construction of the outfit.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the clean line of the jacket and pants, with the absence of the shoulder guard on this side.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic high-collared jacket with asymmetrical shoulder armor, belted tunic, slim pants, and utility pouches
